Obsidian Shard [Obsidian Shatter]  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Obsidian Shatter (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 16
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Placeable

DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6

WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No

i got this one
QuoteReply
# May 29 2003 at 5:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257639859
1 post
i have 25 rogue in newbie server today i was looking around sol a for group....and we was route to forman's room he was on the way it was easy drop for full group and he drops shard and boots...i won the shard dont know what happen to boots anyway i use the shard on goblins and message saying they resist effects must be fire based effects....it is cool for newbies i guess...post me if anyone use on sol a goblins and effects actually have effect on mob
▲ Page top
Cheap now
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2002 at 5:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758106980
222 posts
These seem to average 25 plat in the Xev bazaar - picked one up for my ranger, but then got a crookstinger blade as well now - 60 dot poison effect - until I get my peircing up, looking like that's going to beat this sucker out for my secondary weapon.
▲ Page top
Trolls
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780810624
54 posts
With new troll cultural smithing a troll can turn this baby into a 14/26 (Polished Obsidian Shard) not sure about the race class information, but it's probably: warrior paladin ranger shadowknight rogue. This might raise the price of this baby a little more once troll smiths start becoming common (yea, like thats ever gonna happen) Anyways....u might wanna look into selling this for a bit more to a troll, he might be smithing....

Edited, Tue Jul 23 18:13:34 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Trolls
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2003 at 11:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778129393
Scholar
59 posts
The Polished Obsidian Shard is usable by the same classes, so casters still eligible. The effect still procs at 16 I believe, at least it was proccing at 42 (below the recommended level for the polished shard).

Quite a nice little piercer, and finally a proc so I don't feel like my rogue is wasting his dex.
▲ Page top
effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 7:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694391416187
129 posts
This effect is difficult to proc and almost impossible to stick, at least on creatures in SOL a (they might have an abnormally high fire resist, although my Burning Rapier had no problems roasting the mobs). My level 40 rogue with 164 dex had this item proc/stick an average of 1:5000 swings (once per night). Good luck!
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 1:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361949780
12 posts
"Resistance Check: Fire "

Hence why it would rarely stick to anything in either sol dungeons or lavastorm ;) Give it a few pokes in other zones (hehe test it in perma!) before giving up on it.
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 5:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780810624
54 posts
Nope, the place to test it I think is a duel with a troll or some troll NPC (If u can find one), trolls start with 5 svfire after all...I never like to duel casters because of this.
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2001 at 9:02 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765258974
183 posts
Obsidian Shatter
Decrease Armor Class (AC) by 6 (L1)
Decrease Current Hitpoints by 30 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Fire

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 10 ticks (60 seconds)
Duration Formula: 3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You are surrounded by flickering flames.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by flickering flames.
Spell fades: The flames die down.

Proc Question

# Jan 03 2001 at 8:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245820293
24 posts
I have this item, and I know that it can do a 30pt DD when it hits, but I also know it has an effect beyond this, only because I see a message "Your Obsidian Shatter effect has worn off."
Does this also do a DoT or a debuff of some sort?
▲ Page top

not a dot, but reduces mobs ac by 6
